top_signals.title: NATO weathers another Trump storm but braces for more after Ankara summit
top_signals.summary: The summit ended with relief after months of severe strains triggered by Trump's efforts to take Greenland from ‌fellow NATO ‌member Denmark and divisions over the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
